text:
On  9 May, Joel Sutton wrote:
 > I've been working on a new version of this port. I'll see if I can beat it
 > into shape this weekend (freebsdzine duties permitting).
 
 As in making it install in the regular places ? Cool :)

 I tried quite awhile back, but essetially gave up on it. Seems like a
 lot of work -- good luck
 
 -Th
